name: chr20_20p12_BMP2_SD
description: 20p12.3 SD region containing BMP2 (bone morphogenetic protein 2) and the regulatory region driving the 20p12 recurrent CNV. The locus is flanked by short SDs of ~10-30 kb at 90-95% identity and harbours regulatory polymorphisms strongly associated with bone mineral density.

architecture.internal_structure: Two short ~15 kb direct SDs at 90-95% identity flanking the BMP2 regulatory desert; common 20p12 CNVs reported in non-syndromic and syndromic cohorts.
